description_long: A lush bunch of Concord-style grapes is depicted, featuring numerous deep purple, nearly black, spherical berries tightly clustered together. The grapes are attached to a short, brown stem that emerges from the top center of the bunch. Several large, jagged-edged green leaves partially cover the upper portion of the grapes, adding a naturalistic touch and providing contrast to the dark fruit. The grape skins have a smooth, slightly glossy appearance, suggesting freshness and juiciness. The overall shape of the bunch is conical, with the widest part near the top and tapering toward the bottom. The asset captures the classic look of a ripe grape cluster, suitable for urban park or market scenes.
description: A tightly packed, conical bunch of dark purple grapes with green leaves and a brown stem, featuring smooth, glossy skins. The cluster looks fresh and natural, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full bunch of grapes, with the brown stem and green leaves prominently covering the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered arrangement of leaves over the grapes, with the cluster's conical shape visible.
description_view_2: Another front-angled view, emphasizing the density of the grape cluster and the central position of the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing more shadowed grapes and the leaves draping over the upper portion.
